main_flow_note_summary: The canvas explicitly names SDXL/RealVisXL, Flux-family/Z-Image, and Flux-to-SDXL support passes as executable lanes.
The canvas states additional reference-slot routing and pose/depth/OpenPose control maps remain notes until direct runtime proof exists.
The canvas states WAN/Hunyuan/LTXV/audio remain separate runtime lanes until their own node graphs are merged and proven.
The canvas states exact Main_Flow runtime outputs are required before promotion; layout notes and unrelated smoke outputs must not promote.
The LoRA library is manifest-wired but disabled/disconnected by default.
wave06_consequence: Engine registry must separate observed lanes from planned/proposed engines.
Flux2 can be added only as a planned first-class family, not as already proven.
Engine router must read promotion_status before selecting a lane.
Any video/audio engine must remain blocked until its own workflow and proof manifest exist.
